metrics: Launched 4,000+ experiences on the platform in 70 cities

quote.body: What most (sane) producers would flag as a near-impossible task … was delivered by way of relentless determination, perpetual innovation, and staunch collaboration.

Activated a national influencer network to drive positive sentiment
Designed and delivered donor-focused executive presentations
Presented live to Hillary Clinton
Developed the phase-two scaling plan launching in 2026

Produced 3,500+ live activations for high-touch audiences

intro.headline: Every great story starts with an experience.
intro.lede: We are a global team of creative innovators building game-changing partnerships with the world's most influential brands.
intro.tagline: We don't do projects. We build platforms.
intro.heroHeadline: Every great story starts with an experience.
intro.heroLede: We are a global team of creative innovators building game-changing partnerships with the world's most influential brands. We don't do projects. We build platforms.

topCreds: Scaled Airbnb Experiences in 70 cities from Los Angeles to London, Sydney, Seoul and Sao Paulo
Onboarded a team of 250 creative connectors in just four weeks across five continents
Hand-produced 1,000+ high-touch experiences in 20 major markets from Europe to Asia in nine months
Built Apple's experiential and buzz strategy, from creating a secret home in Tribeca to designing the original marketing plan for the iPhone
Collaborated with brands including Cartier, Louis Vuitton, GQ, Warner Bros, Netflix, Amazon, Google, Meta, Instagram, P&G, and Havaianas
Serve as the in-house experiential team for the James Beard Foundation and the controlling partner for its iconic West Village house
Modelled social strategy for the Clinton Policy Institute

founders.name: Brown Bartholomew
founders.title: CEO & CO-FOUNDER
founders.bio: Brown Bartholomew is the CEO and co-founder of CAPE, where he brings global talent together across entertainment, music, sports, technology, and social media to create culture-defining work. A creative strategist and relationship builder, Brown spent 16 years at Apple leading the Global Buzz Marketing team, launching the original iPhone, and established Apple's first social media and culture strategy. With a rare instinct for culture and technology, he helps brands stay ahead of what's coming next.

founders.name: Jessica Resler
founders.title: CO-FOUNDER
founders.bio: Jessica Resler is the co-founder of CAPE, with an otherworldly track record of bringing brilliant ideas to life. She is a creative and experiential pioneer who has scaled projects for industry icons like Apple, Airbnb, Mondelez, Dell, and many more. She is a leader in long-form experiential and has partnered with the world's top brands and talent to deliver ambitious platform projects at scale. Her expertise spans immersive design, storytelling, and emerging technology with a focus on originality and results.

customServices: Digital, social, and physical product (swag, merch, activations)
